meta.title: Modulia | Modular Homes
meta.description: Modulia — sustainable, customisable modular homes ready to live in. We build your future, module by module.

home.heroText: Premium modular solutions — sustainable, customisable and ready to live in.

models.title: Our models
models.subtitle: Fourteen models for private clients, from compact studios to family villas — sorted by price range.
models.pageIntro: Every Modulia model is designed to blend harmoniously into its surroundings. Explore the features, plans and 3D views of each home.

modelCatalogLinks.title: Personalisation & options
modelCatalogLinks.text: Choose your included finishes and optional equipment — or build your module in the configurator.

modelDetail.defaultClosing: Our team supports you from design to installation.

personnalisation.title: Personalisation
personnalisation.intro: Choose your finishes and colours — included in your model price, at no extra cost. For add-on equipment and services, see our options.
personnalisation.readyText: Configure your model and choose your included finishes.

options.title: Options
options.intro: Equipment, terraces, connections and complementary services for your project. Finishes included in the price are under personalisation.
options.readyText: Contact our team to compose your module with the right options.

cuisines.title: Kitchens
cuisines.intro: Base configuration included in every module, with complementary options to adapt your kitchen space to your needs.
cuisines.optionsConfigSub: Add-on modules to equip your kitchen.
cuisines.surMesureSub: Contemporary kitchen priced per linear metre — bespoke design.
cuisines.ctaText: Choose your model and compose the kitchen that fits your project.

piscine.title: Pool
piscine.metaDescription: Sofa Pool modular pool — {price} € incl. VAT, turnkey. Compact, elegant, no groundworks.

install.text: Install the app for quick access to our models, customisation and quotes.
install.iosHint: On iPhone / iPad: tap Share then Add to Home Screen.

features.title: Why choose Modulia?
features.subtitle: We combine precision engineering with contemporary design to deliver modular homes that exceed expectations.

items.title: Fast construction
items.description: Modules prefabricated in a controlled factory — up to 60% less time than traditional construction.

items.title: Sustainability
items.description: Selected materials, minimised waste and high-performance insulation for reduced energy consumption.

items.title: Total customisation
items.description: Layouts, finishes and dimensions tailored to your needs — expand the modules as life evolves.

items.title: Guaranteed quality
items.description: Rigorous quality control in an industrial environment, with structural warranty and after-delivery follow-up.

construction.title: Module construction principle
construction.intro: Designed with quality materials and advanced construction techniques to guarantee durability, comfort and performance.
construction.imageAlt: Exploded view of Modulia's modular construction

benefits.title: Durable materials
benefits.description: Materials selected for their strength and longevity

benefits.title: Thermal comfort
benefits.description: Excellent thermal regulation summer and winter

benefits.title: Precision construction
benefits.description: Controlled assembly and rigorous quality control

technicalSpecs.title: Modulia module specifications
technicalSpecs.intro: Structural, thermal and equipment characteristics of our prefabricated modules — designed to last and adapt to every project.

sections.title: General structure
items: Load-bearing structure: galvanised steel or powder-coated steel chassis
Self-supporting frame designed for transport and crane installation
Estimated lifespan: 30 to 50 years depending on maintenance

sections.title: Dimensions & modularity
items: Floor area: from 13 m² to over 100 m² depending on configuration

sections.title: Envelope & insulation
items: Exterior walls: steel / aluminium sandwich panels with integrated insulation (rock wool, glass wool or PU foam)
Thermal insulation compliant with RE2020 / equivalent — wall R ≈ 3 to 4 m²·K/W, roof R ≈ 5 to 6 m²·K/W
Acoustic insulation: ≈ 35–45 dB depending on composition

sections.title: Joinery
items: Glazed façades: large aluminium glazed bays
Glazing: insulated double glazing (triple glazing option), thermal and solar treatment available
Doors: secure aluminium entrance door, multi-point lock

sections.title: Technical equipment
items: Electricity: installation to NFC 15-100 standard, integrated electrical panel
Plumbing: pre-installed hot / cold water networks, PVC drainage
Heating / air conditioning: reversible air conditioning (split or ducted), underfloor heating option

sections.title: Interior fittings
items: Interior walls: decorative panels or plasterboard
Bathroom: shower, WC, pre-installed vanity unit

sections.title: Transport & installation
items: Delivery: road transport on a flatbed truck
Installation: on a concrete slab, concrete footings or metal piles

contact.title: Request your quote
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. Our team will get back to you within 48 hours with a personalised proposal.
contact.successFallback: Request received! We'll be in touch shortly.
contact.successFull: Thank you! We've received your request and will be in touch shortly.

professionnels.title: Self-contained modular offices
professionnels.intro: Turnkey spaces with integrated sanitary facilities, connection-ready utilities and premium finishes — for construction sites, events and professional activities.
professionnels.ctaFinalTitle: A turnkey space to boost your business
professionnels.ctaFinalText: Attract, welcome, convince. Modulia takes care of the rest.
professionnels.needDetailText: All technical information is presented on this page in French. Contact us for a detailed sheet in your language.
